package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_temporary_byte_slice_for_string_write: Layer: Memory allocation. Flag []byte(string) conversions used only to write strings to writers.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule568PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario568Positive(records []Rule568PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
